title: Powder Ice
description: Replaces Powder Snow with Powder Ice
body:
# Powder Ice! ![texture](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3f04a4c80928ac8dbf44ea44f2e0e7965874abda_0.webp)

![render](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/04d03dc31673d1085f8197d0982ea1b5e0d7d52f_0.webp)

This texture pack can help identifying powder snow from other snow with an _almost_ vanilla texture

Original Texture from Minecraft Plus Block and Biome V (not on modrinth) and can be found [here](https://minecraft-max.net/craft/minecraft-plus-block-biome-mod/)
